name: Java Edition 26.1.1 - Minecraft Wiki
snippet: 26.1.1 is a hotfix for Java Edition released on April 1, 2026, which fixes an issue with chat reporting. It is compatible with 26.1 servers.

name: Minecraft Java Edition 26.1.1 - Reddit
snippet: No, they changed the naming format. 26.1.1 is basically what 1.22.1 would have been. From now on the first number is the year.

name: Java Edition 26.1.2 - Minecraft Wiki
snippet: 26.1.2 is a hotfix for Java Edition released on April 9, 2026, which tweaks UI checkboxes and fixes an exploit. It is compatible with 26.1 and 26.1.1 servers.
